summary: Iteration 2 — verified the 4 new feature additions for Splash. Backend: 19/19 pytest pass (6 new tests added: recipient duplicate 409, PUT update + collision, transfer sui_tx_hash + sui_explorer_url + valid PDF receipt starting with %PDF-, [EMAIL MOCK] log on transfer create + on completion, [SMS MOCK] log on completion when recipient has mobile, status_notified prevents duplicate notifications, receipt 404 on unknown id). Frontend (Playwright): admin login → Recipients edit modal opens via card menu, Add new recipient modal opens in add mode, duplicate account submission shows inline error 'This account already exists for {name}' + toast, full Send Payout wizard (Recipient → Amount → Review → FPX modal with 6 banks → authorize spinner → Track step) works, View on Sui Explorer href points to suiscan.xyz/mainnet/tx/0x..., Download receipt button on Track step downloads valid PDF, Transfers row dropdown 'Download PDF' downloads valid PDF. Resend & Twilio correctly fall back to mocked console logs since no API keys are set.

issues: A11y warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby' for DialogContent — add a DialogDescription element or aria-describedby attribute to silence Radix warning.

action_items: (Optional) Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to recipient-edit-modal to clear the Radix UI accessibility warning.
(Optional) The Transfers row 'Download PDF' DropdownMenuItem has no data-testid (works via visible text but adding e.g. data-testid=`download-pdf-${r.id}` would harden tests).

(Nice-to-have) status_notified flag is set BEFORE awaiting notify_email/notify_sms — if the email/sms call raises before it logs the mock line, the flag is already persisted. Currently safe because mocked path never raises, but should be noted for future real-Resend deployment.
critical_code_review_comments: advance_transfer: status_notified write happens before the notify_* calls — if a real provider raises after the DB update, we never re-attempt. Acceptable for demo, flag for prod.
PDF receipt endpoint synchronously builds PDF in-process (~few KB, fine for now). If receipts grow larger or volume rises, offload to BackgroundTasks or a worker.

notify_email/notify_sms use blocking `requests` inside async endpoints — same pattern as fetch_fx_rate. With real keys this would block the event loop. Switch to httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_executor for prod.

FPX modal is purely client-side mock (good as documented) — no backend FPX endpoint exists, so the UI 'authorize' is essentially a 1.6s setTimeout before POST /api/transfers. Document this clearly to avoid confusion in prod swap.

Recipient duplicate check loops via async cursor in Python rather than a Mongo query on a normalized field. For thousands of recipients per user this is O(n). Consider storing account_number_norm and a compound unique index (user_id, bank, account_number_norm).
server.py is now ~640 lines — split into routers/{auth,recipients,transfers,batch}.py and helpers/{notifications,pdf,fx}.py for maintainability.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (added 6 new tests for duplicates, PUT, PDF, sui fields, email/sms mocks)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on flows tested (login, recipients edit/add, duplicate UI error, send-payout wizard E2E with FPX modal → Track, sui explorer link, receipt PDF download from Track + from Transfers row)

seed_data_creation: Tests create+cleanup TEST_-prefixed recipients (TEST_DupOriginal, TEST_DupOtherBank, TEST_Edit_A/B, TEST_PDF_Rec, TEST_MockLog, TEST_SMS_Rec). Also cleaned up the TEST_UI_Recipient leftover from the Send-Payout UI test run. The pre-existing '211111' BPI recipient remains as instructed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features work end-to-end. Mock email/SMS lines appear in /var/log/supervisor/backend.*.log as `[EMAIL MOCK] ...` and `[SMS MOCK] ...`. The Send Payout wizard UI flow: fill recipient (use [data-testid=recipient-bank] combobox + [role=option]) → step-recipient-continue → send-amount + step-amount-continue → confirm-payment opens [data-testid=fpx-modal] → click [data-testid=fpx-bank-Maybank2u] → [data-testid=fpx-authorize] → ~1.6s authorizing spinner → [data-testid=step-track] appears with view-sui-explorer + download-receipt buttons. Save-recipient checkbox in step 1 defaults to true and will create a recipient on transfer creation; uncheck if you don't want DB pollution. On Recipients page, Add modal and Edit modal share the same component and same [data-testid=recipient-edit-modal] testid, with [data-testid=edit-error] for inline duplicate error.
rca of the issue: No bugs found — all assertions in the review request pass.
